programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 140
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: IM ADDICTED TO NENG NASI UDUK CANS
programme.desc: After a rebellious escape from his restrictive life, Gibran crosses paths with Suci, a humble girl who sells nasi uduk. Determined to change his ways, Gibran sets out on a mission to win her heart and prove he is her dream match.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 192
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: POV Disekop-Sekop Cogan 34M Followers
programme.desc: During a chaotic fight, Echa (Zoe Abbas Jackson) and El (Cinta Brian) accidentally knock Tristan (Kevin Hillers) unconscious. Panicking and thinking he’s dead, they plan to hide the 'body' to avoid jail. But just as they are about to dump him, Tristan wakes up! Instead of being angry, Tristan who was bored with his daily routine is thrilled by the adventure and asks them to take him on a vacation.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 646
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 140
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: I LEFT MY LOVE IN KEBUN JERUK
programme.desc: Sita went to Bali to visit her uncle, Pak Yusak, an orange collector known for buying crops at very low prices. Together with his son, Herdi, Pak Yusak had long dominated the orange trade in the area. Dewan, an orange farmer, fought for a price increase for the sake of fairness for the farmers, but his efforts were always rejected. At first, Sita was unaware of the conflict, but after learning about it, she chose to support Dewan. Sita's stance angered Herdi, who kicked her out.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 192
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ketemu di Mimpi is Level 34 of Kangen
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start after a breakup, Saskia (Saskia Chadwick) joins an 'open trip' where she meets Yudha (Rizky Nazar), the charming group leader. They share a romantic night stargazing in the forest, but Saskia wakes up in a hospital with a shock: the travel agency claims they have no record of anyone named Yudha

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 646
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: GAK GITU KONSEPNYA MAEMUNAH
programme.desc: Maya’s (formerly Maemunah) arrogance leads to a bizarre curse: she suddenly reeks of salted fish, threatening to end her singing career! In a twist of fate, she meets Darto, a handsome salted-fish vendor. Could their meeting be the key to breaking the smelly curse and saving her voice?

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 141

programme.desc: Rana (Aylena Fusil) works as a roadside ghost cosplayer to pay off her brother's debts. When she tries to help a lost child who happens to be Erza’s (El Ryan Carlen) nephew Erza arrives and mistakenly accuses the 'ghost' of trying to kidnap the boy.

programme.desc: After Kevin (Mahdy Reza) is attacked, his concerned mother, Mayang, hires Juleha (Larasati Nugroho) as his bodyguard. Kevin is insulted and refuses, believing that having a female protector is both embarrassing and impossible.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 27
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Siti Ooo Som - EP 6
programme.desc: Program berbentuk permainan yang akan mempertandingkan dua kumpulan selebriti dalam pelbagai acara dan dihoskan oleh Dato' Siti Nurhaliza.

programme.title: Tua Pun Boleh - EP 3
programme.desc: Rancangan ini menampilkan pelbagai aktiviti lasak penuh aksi yang bakal diharungi oleh para selebriti veteran yang mengikuti aktiviti ini.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 5
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Pesta Muda Mudi - EP 4
programme.desc: Memberi penghargaan kepada lagu-lagu pop Malaysia sepanjang zaman dari tahun 1930 hingga ke tahun 2010 untuk dipersembahkan oleh artis tempatan dalam bentuk akustik.

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Bonda Bonding - EP 19
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, saksikan artis kegemaran anda apabila mereka mempunyai pelbagai aktiviti yang mereka suka luangkan bersama ibu mereka yang tersayang. Jangan terlepas detik istimewa bersama mereka!

programme.title: Ek Eleh! Afdlin! Afdlin - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancagan hiburan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Skrin Komedia: Tuyul Ke London - EP 13
programme.desc: Drama komedi seram tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: Kiah Pekasam - EP 7
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Kiah yang sangat jujur di dalam percakapannya memulakan kehidupan baru di kampungnya.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 12
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Sembang Pacak S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Joras & Stars - EP 10
programme.desc: Joras & Stars ialah sketsa bersama artis jemputan setiap minggu untuk menghiburkan penonton melalui sketsa yang kelakar.

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 30
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 44

programme.title: Lawak Orang Lejen
programme.desc: Gabungan sitkom dan temu bual bersama barisan pelakon komedi lejen yang mengamit memori penonton komedi 90an. Pelbagai aktiviti & persembahan dari tetamu undangan yang akan memeriahkan lagi Hari Raya anda.

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu S2 - EP 7

programme.title: Kau Rasa? - EP 18
programme.desc: Rancangan 'prank' yang merakamkan reaksi spontan orang ramai dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.desc: Sebuah sketsa yang menampilkan finalis MLM 2017 membawakan watak lucu yang bertemakan isu semasa. Selain itu, program ini turut memaparkan nilai murni dan pengajaran yang berguna buat penonton.

programme.title: Sembang Teh Tarik S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: Sembang Teh Tarik yang dikendalikan Datuk AC Mizal ia merupakan program 'talk show' yang terbaru dan santai sesuai untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza - EP 6
programme.desc: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza musin kedua menampilakan Tauke, Ropi, Zaibo dan ramai lagi meredah kampung kampung dan melakukan pelbagai aktiviti.

programme.title: Stand Up Comedy Otai - EP 7
programme.desc: Masihkah anda ingat akan Pi Mai Pi Mai Tang Tu, Senario, Salih Yaacob, dan ramai lagi lagenda komedi tanah air? Kini mereka kembali di atas satu pentas bagi mengubat kerinduan terhadap mereka.

programme.title: Sorok - Sorok - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Lawak Minggu Ini - EP 1
programme.desc: Kompilasi lawak terbaik minggu ini untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2021 - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Lawak Ke Dik? - EP 13
programme.desc: Program untuk kanak-kanak bagi menyuarakan pendapat dan berkongsi buah fikiran mereka secara spontan.

programme.title: Geng Gajet - EP 6
programme.desc: Geng Gajet mengikuti sekumpulan rakan dari pelbagai latar belakang yang menyelesaikan masalah mereka setiap hari menggunakan kemahiran digital & pengekodan mereka.

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Terbaekk! - EP 1
programme.desc: Kompilasi lawak terbaik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Cakap Melayu Lah! - EP 12
programme.desc: Sebuah sitcom yang berkisarkan tentang Encik Daud, Puan Rozita, Mak Som, Abdul dan beberapa pelajar di sebuah sekolah bahasa di KL.

programme.title: Makan - EP 7
programme.desc: Meneroka masakan yang lain dari yang lain, memberikan tips mudah ketika di dapur dan membawa anda ke restoran-restoran yang terkemuka di sekitar Kuala Lumpur

programme.title: Warna Live: Arena Panggang - EP 7
programme.desc: Siapakah yang paling handal memanggang dan siapakah yang bakal dipanggang?

programme.title: Frust Gila - EP 13
programme.desc: Rancangan permainan penuh cabaran untuk 3 peserta, cabaran di sediakan untuk mendapatkan hanya satu pemenang.

programme.title: Lawak Ke Der Tak Coverline - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan bual bicara yang menampilkan pelawak-pelawak terkenal Malaysia dan dihoskan oleh Hans Isaac.

programme.title: Konnichiwa Superlawak - EP 2
programme.desc: Saksikan Jep, Rahim, Pak Ya, Tomok, dan rakan-rakan bola sepak Superlawak FC menjelajah ke Jepun demi menyahut cabaran perlawanan persahabatan menentang pasukan tempatan di bumi Jepun!

programme.title: Fan Fanatik - EP 5
programme.desc: Menampilkan dua pasukan yang terdiri daripada ahli kelab peminat selebriti tempatan bersaing di antara satu sama lain bagi mendapatkan takhta fan fanatik.

programme.title: Gila Viral - EP 3
programme.desc: Dr Zarra dan Ladyku dua orang seteru dalam dunia perniagaan produk kecantikan, mereka adalah dua sahabat baik yang saling menyanyangi dalam berselisih faham kerana permasalahan cinta.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat - EP 4
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Legenda Puteri Qaseh S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Legenda Puteri Qaseh kembali untuk musim ke-2! Sebagai Permaisuri Kayajaya, dia menghadapi cabaran konspirasi merampas takhta, wabak Achum mengancam nyawa dan dijodohkan dengan Putera Nusaria.

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 4
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: Generasi Gamerz - EP 3

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 3
programme.desc: Electricity outages are increasingly intense and increasingly frequent throughout Quebec. Harvey has no choice but to explain the reality of the situation to Hamelin. The terrorist threat still hangs over both the university and Gabrielle.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 4
programme.desc: Because the USA depends largely on Quebec for its electricity, American President RIchards demands that Hamelin resolves the power outages, threatening to cut Quebec off economically if he doesn't. It's consternation all round...

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 4
programme.desc: After more than fifty years selling newspapers by shouting the headlines, Ali was made a Knight of the National Order of Merit. At 18, he left Pakistan and arrived in France without knowing the language. By selling ''Charlie Hebdo'', ''Hara-Kiri'' and later ''Le Monde'', he became an emblematic figure of the Saint-Germain-des-Pres district in Paris.

programme.title: La Mer Au Loin
programme.desc: Nour, 27, clandestinely emigrates from Morocco to Marseille in search of a better future. With his friends, he lives off small trafficking operations and leads a marginal and festive life. When he meets Serge and Noemie, a charismatic and mysterious police officer and his wife, his existence takes an unexpected turn.

programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel - EP 3
programme.desc: Danielle Mitterrand was hurt when the existence of Mazarine, Mitterrand's secret daughter, and her mother Anne Pingeot were made official. She left, fed up with her husband's secrets. At the highest level of government, emotions were running high. The President was once again faced with a crisis that was threatening his public image.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel - EP 4
programme.desc: His illness was worrying and weakening Francois Mitterrand just when he had to travel to Strasbourg for the French presidency of the European Union. He nevertheless found the strength to follow through on the path he had set for himself: to pass on his message to future generations and to reconcile his two families.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 5
programme.desc: Time's imprint lies at the heart of Frederique Gourdon's artistic exploration. After years of working with mixed media-painting, engraving, collage-she experienced a profound encounter in 2015 with paper and plant fiber.

programme.title: La Mer Au Loin
programme.desc: Nour, 27, clandestinely emigrates from Morocco to Marseille in search of a better future. With his friends, he lives off small trafficking operations and leads a marginal and festive life. When he meets Serge and Noemie, a charismatic and mysterious police officer and his wife, his existence takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Reunion, Les Nouvelles Soeurs Vanille
programme.desc: Owners of a vanilla plantation in Saint-Andre, the Appavoupoulle girls, otherwise known as the Vanilla Sisters, developed vanilla-growing on Reunion Island from the 1930s. The interwoven portraits of three women who, in their own way, continue to keep Bourbon vanilla alive and well, and support the struggle of its producers.

programme.title: Journal D'une Ambulanciere
programme.desc: Recently qualified, 26 year-old Megane is taken on by the Swiss Ambulance Rescue company in Geneva. During the Covid-19 crisis, the novice spent several months working with the 54 year-old ambulance driver, Christophe. Keeping regular notes in her journal, Megane hopes to pass on the valuable lessons she has learned.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 5
programme.desc: Time's imprint lies at the heart of Frederique Gourdon's artistic exploration. After years of working with mixed media-painting, engraving, collage-she experienced a profound encounter in 2015 with paper and plant fiber.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Mise Au Point
programme.desc: The best reports from ''Mise au Point'', the programme that takes a fresh look at national and international news events. Through its exclusive investigations and in-depth reports, ''Mise au Point'' tackles a wide range of topics: politics, economics, social issues, sports, culture and new trends.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 14
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits an antique shop in Saint-etienne-au-Mont, in the Pas-de-Calais. Then, in the Alpes-Maritimes, she discovers the studio of a ceramic artist.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 15
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 37
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 38
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Fara - EP 7
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: Les Metiers - EP 49
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans ca - EP 35
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: La Clef - C'est Quoi Ton Truc Julie ? - EP 20
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: Les Danger - EP 3
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: Les Danger - EP 4
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 42
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 23
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 33
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 19
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 6
programme.desc: Etienne Moyat's creations reflect his deep respect and love for nature. A trained cabinetmaker, he produces unique, monumental pieces for high-end projects. Alongside this, he pursues an intense and instinctive painting practice.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera - EP 90
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 5
programme.desc: After growing up in a squat near Paris and then in a working-class neighborhood in the 19th arrondissement, Sikou became an author and director. His work explores the fractures of identity, social class, gender and racism. Through cinema and writing, he gives a voice to those condemned to silence.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 87
programme.desc: She's a big name in French swimming! Olympic silver medalist in Athens in 2004, multiple European and World medalist, she was for years the face of French sprinting in the pool: Malia Metella is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F - EP 9
programme.desc: In the Chateau-Rouge district of Paris, Richard Orlinski meets Diadie Diombana, a self-taught chef of Malian origin, who embodies a mixed cuisine blending West African, Japanese and Latin American influences. With him, the market becomes a true laboratory of inspiration, where each ingredient is a bridge between cultures. In Marseille, Hugues Mbanda, a chef originally from Kinshasa, has a journey marked by exile and a passion for French gastronomy.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'aventures - EP 2
programme.desc: He figures amongst the thirty Canadians aged under 30 considered the most influential in terms of sustainable development. Justin Fisch welcomes a group for a trip by canoe-kayak through the Everglades: a forty-kilometre journey to explore the famous wetlands.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 8
programme.desc: Clemence d'Ennery unveils her collection of Asian works in a Paris hotel. Using porcelain petals, Juliette Clovis opens up a luminous, dreamlike world. At Rabanne, we push the boundaries of women's dressing with bold materials. Immerse yourself in the studio of artist Marion Mezenge.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 23
programme.desc: On the menu: maple-glazed spicy pork, maple and apple lentil salad, maple caramelised tofu, homemade maple leaf biscuit.

programme.title: Parlons eco
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Rugby - Top 14
programme.desc: French Rugby Union Championship match (Top 14).

programme.title: Rugby - Top 14
programme.desc: French Rugby Union Championship match (Top 14).

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Meurtres En Perigord Vert
programme.desc: In Perigord, Isabelle Maurin, recently crowned Queen of Araucania, is found decapitated in the garden of the chateau she has just inherited. This is not the first murder linked to this family. Emma Lambert, a young police lieutenant from Bordeaux, conducts the investigation with Sacha Besson, a lieutenant of the local gendarmerie.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 39
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW31 Manchester City v Crystal Palace
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 36
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 40
programme.desc: Tyler Adams' story is one of dedication, commitment and sacrifice. From the early days when his mother would drive him hundreds of miles to training to pursue a dream, to the influence of his stepfather and three brothers, Adams' journey from MLS prospect to Premier League star has been a fascinating one.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 50
programme.desc: Andros Townsend reflects on a career shaped by both extraordinary highs and deeply personal challenges. Filmed in Thailand, where he has rediscovered his love for the game, Townsend looks back on a footballing journey that took him through some of England's biggest clubs, while navigating the pressures, setbacks and defining moments that tested him on and off the pitch.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 6
programme.desc: As far as cult heroes go, few are as beloved as Dimitar Berbatov. In a seven-year Premier League career, the Bulgarian set the league alight with his grace and elegance with the ball at this feet. This week, Berbatov sits down with PL Moments to reflect on his career and pick out his stand out memories from a glittering Premier League career.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 39
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 20
programme.desc: Danny Murphy's first season with Fulham proved to be one to remember. The Cottagers' 2007/08 campaign saw them go from doomed to defiant in a matter of matches, rescued at the very last moment, with Murphy playing a pivotal role.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW31 Manchester City v Crystal Palace
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2007/2008 season.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 40
programme.desc: Tyler Adams' story is one of dedication, commitment and sacrifice. From the early days when his mother would drive him hundreds of miles to training to pursue a dream, to the influence of his stepfather and three brothers, Adams' journey from MLS prospect to Premier League star has been a fascinating one.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 39
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 - EP 5
programme.desc: Known simply as 'The Yak,' Yakubu takes on 1-to-11, selecting his ultimate lineup from the best players he shared the pitch with. A powerhouse striker with 95 Premier League goals across spells at Portsmouth, Middlesbrough, Everton, and Blackburn, he reflects on the teammates who made the biggest impression during his career. Expect a team full of strength, flair, and goalscoring pedigree.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 39
programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 9
programme.desc: Newcastle United are a team on the rise under Eddie Howe; a manager quietly rewriting the modern history of the club. With exclusive access and interviews from inside St. James' Park, we uncover the transformation Howe has led, from stabilising the team to delivering silverware and reigniting belief on Tyneside. As the Magpies set their sights on even greater heights, we ask just how far he can take this ambitious, resurgent club.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 8
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.desc: Join PGMOL Chief Refereeing Officer Howard Webb and former Premier League star Michael Owen, as they use previously un-released audio from the on-field officials and VAR teams to explain refereeing decisions. This ground-breaking broadcast will feature the in-game audio of selected incidents from the 2025/26 season.

programme.desc: Haaland or Salah? Saka or Palmer? Isak or Cunha? Picking your Fantasy team is never easy, but the Fantasy Show is on hand to help FPL Managers with those big decisions.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 50
programme.desc: Andros Townsend reflects on a career shaped by both extraordinary highs and deeply personal challenges. Filmed in Thailand, where he has rediscovered his love for the game, Townsend looks back on a footballing journey that took him through some of England's biggest clubs, while navigating the pressures, setbacks and defining moments that tested him on and off the pitch.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 38
programme.desc: I left here as a boy and I'm definitely coming back as a man. With 25 goals in Aston Villa's promotion-winning Championship season in 2018/19, Tammy Abraham still holds a special place in the hearts of Villa fans. Having risen through the ranks at Chelsea but then moved on by Thomas Tuchel, a determination to succeed saw him win plaudits wherever he played - For Roma and AC Milan in Serie A and lately for Besiktas, but Abraham has unfinished business in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 6
programme.desc: As far as cult heroes go, few are as beloved as Dimitar Berbatov. In a seven-year Premier League career, the Bulgarian set the league alight with his grace and elegance with the ball at this feet. This week, Berbatov sits down with PL Moments to reflect on his career and pick out his stand out memories from a glittering Premier League career.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 49
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Liverpool (MW37) (Live) - EP 361
programme.desc: Aston Villa have won just one of their last 16 Premier League games against Liverpool (D3 L12), a 7-2 home win in October 2020.

programme.title: FS MMA Bill Mahood vs. Khalil Ibrahim
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! In this episode from St. Petersburg, Russia, Khalil Ibrahim throws a flurry of fists against Bill Mahood in a three round fight.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jean Pascal vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a Light Heavyweight Unification battle as WBO Champion Jean Pascal (25-1, 16 KOs) takes on undefeated IBO Champion, Chad Dawson, (29-0, 17 KOs) on August 14, 2010 at the Bell Centre in Montreal, Quebec, Canada. The fight ends in a decision after a controverial headbutt.

programme.title: Mega Fights In 60 Joel Julio vs.James Kirkland
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a Super Welterweight, 10 Round contest featuring Joel Julio (34-2, 31 KOs) vs.undefeated James Kirkland, aka 'Mandingo Warrior' (24-0, 21 KOs) from the HP Pavilion in San Jose, California, USA on March 3, 2009.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Orlando Qualifier tackle the Orlando Finals course, which includes the Salmon Ladder, Cannonball Alley, Helix Hang and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Joe Calzaghe vs. Roy Jones, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light heavyweight championship fight featuring Joe Calzaghe and Roy Jones, Jr. This epic bout would prove to be the last of Calzage's career. Many wanted him to retire because he had nothing left to prove, and Calzaghe would officially do so 3 months later. Also on the card, Chris Arreola shows everyone why he is a heavyweight contender.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 features Abi, Kakuryu, Hakuho and Shodaii from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Hague Grand Prix and we follow some of Netherlands' judo heroes as they try to mark the event with a medal tally to be proud of.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Jan Zaveck vs. Andre Berto
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features the IBF Welterweight title bout, Jan Zaveck, aka 'Mr. Sympathicus', (31-1, 18 KOs) vs. Andre Berto (27-1, 21 KOs) from Beau Rivage Resort and Casino in Biloxi, Mississippi, USA, on September 3, 2011. Andre Berto, coming off losing the WBC title to Victor Ortiz, was looking for vengeance against Zaveck.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Tokyo Grand Slam where the home nation is looking to dominate as they fielded 7 of Japan's 8 world champions. Plus we catch up with Japan's brother and sister superstars, the Abe's.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Andre Berto vs. Luis Collazo
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Andre Berto defending the WBC welterweight title against former WBA champion Luis Collazo. Each fighter had their own share of getting stunned throughout the bout, and the judges' decision at the end will have some controversy. Also on the card, kickboxing takes center stage as super heavyweight legend Daniel Ghita takes on Gokhan Saki.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, Show 1 features Kotoshoho, Terunofuji, Hokutofuji and Tochinoshin.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Amir Mansour vs. Fred Kassi
programme.desc: Wide World Of Fights includes all styles of fighting from around the world in one show! This episode features a Heavyweight bout between an once-beaten Amir Mansour and big-hitting Fred Kassi, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 3 of 4.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 1
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and three trusted returnees are back for another wild charter season but when two deckies are sidelined by illness, the crew struggles to get the boat ready in time for charter. Aesha worries one of her green stews may be giving her deju vu. A crewmember damages the boat on the first night.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 2
programme.desc: The deck team struggles to find their footing, and big mistakes are made. A stew begins to flirt with all male crewmembers on board. The chef struggles to get a handle on eccentric guest requests. Tension between two deckhands escalates to a heated argument.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 3
programme.desc: A group of wealthy socialites keep the crew busy. The stews vie for attention from the guys. Meanwhile, the deck team downfall continues as major mistakes cause chaos including a deckhand that floats out to sea on a jet ski.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 4
programme.desc: A group of young, entitled guests continue to cause chaos for the crew. The chef pulls together an over-the-top eight-course tasting menu that totally rocks and when the primary demands a late-night swim, it lands him and the crew in murky waters. Two deckhands have become a liability and Capt. Sandy and Nathan must figure out what to do about it.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 5
programme.desc: A massive changeover rocks the boat. A stew gets pulled in multiple and a flirty love triangle starts to heat up. The chef struggles to cater to vegan guests with particular palates and complaints.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 6
programme.desc: Bad weather rolls in suddenly and causes chaos. A crew member takes on a new role and shifts the group dynamic. Romance heats up on board, prompting jealousy and a crew member initiates a tearful breakup.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 7
programme.desc: A new crew member joins and whips the boat into shape. A bachelor charters the yacht along with his matchmaker in the hopes of finding love while at sea. A newly single crew member sends romantic possibilities spinning. The Chief Stew gives a sharp warning about a love triangle on board.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 8
programme.desc: The deck team comes under fire for being too lax on the job. The Primary gets in hot water with the women he’s dating. A promotion on the interior leaves a stew feeling envious. An unexpected hook-up sends shockwaves through the crew.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 9
programme.desc: A shocking hook-up divides the interior. During a day out at a beach club, sexual tension explodes in every direction. The charter guests insult the yacht crew. A deckhand puts a guest in a compromising situation.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 10
programme.desc: The chef is tasked with preparing an unusual dish for dinner. The guests stay up late and cause damage around the boat during a night of fun during docking, sending the deck team into a panic. Some of the on-board romances heat up while others fizzle out.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 11
programme.desc: The Bosun makes a difficult choice that angers one of the deckhands. A romance that was getting serious starts to take a turn. A group of hot charter guests come aboard and one of the stews is smitten. Tensions on the deck team spill over and cause meltdowns.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 12
programme.desc: When a crew member has to leave the boat, a secret kiss happens that sends the entire crew into a spiral. The crew visits an elite sailing team and attends a flamenco show where major epiphanies occur. A surprise visitor comes aboard that could change everything.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 13
programme.desc: A blast from the past has one of the crew members desperate to reignite an old flame. New crew configurations cause resentments to blossom. A guest leaves an unwelcome surprise in the shower, setting off a mystery within the interior.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 14
programme.desc: Two crew members contend with whether or not to feel guilty after committing a major betrayal. Romantic entanglements on the boat get messy. A crew member returns and is shocked to discover that everything has changed.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 15
programme.desc: A betrayal is revealed and awkwardness and confrontations follow. While a crew member is running out of time to get a second chance, a major breakup changes everything. The deck team struggles to work in the swell, which causes a huge blow up between two deckhands.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 16
programme.desc: An argument over a jet ski causes a major rift in the deck team. A long-held bromance is threatened. A heart-to-heart about commitment is interrupted and tempers flare in multiple directions.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 17
programme.desc: A group of loud, brash New Yorkers board the boat and put the crew back on their heels. Bad weather keeps the boat at the dock and a considerable emergency pops up. A crew member gets injured. A long-running friendship frays.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 18
programme.desc: The charter season comes to an end and two crew members go all in on a bad decision. A returning visitor has a pleasant surprise. Some crew members get happy endings while others exchange harsh words. For a couple of crew members, the end is just the beginning.

programme.desc: Two crew members contend with whether or not to feel guilty after committing a major betrayal. Romantic entanglements on the boat get messy. A crew member returns and is shocked to discover that everything has changed.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 15
programme.desc: A betrayal is revealed and awkwardness and confrontations follow. While a crew member is running out of time to get a second chance, a major breakup changes everything. The deck team struggles to work in the swell, which causes a huge blow up between two deckhands.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 16
programme.desc: An argument over a jet ski causes a major rift in the deck team. A long-held bromance is threatened. A heart-to-heart about commitment is interrupted and tempers flare in multiple directions.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 17
programme.desc: A group of loud, brash New Yorkers board the boat and put the crew back on their heels. Bad weather keeps the boat at the dock and a considerable emergency pops up. A crew member gets injured. A long-running friendship frays.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 18
programme.desc: The charter season comes to an end and two crew members go all in on a bad decision. A returning visitor has a pleasant surprise. Some crew members get happy endings while others exchange harsh words. For a couple of crew members, the end is just the beginning.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 1
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and three trusted returnees are back for another wild charter season but when two deckies are sidelined by illness, the crew struggles to get the boat ready in time for charter. Aesha worries one of her green stews may be giving her deju vu. A crewmember damages the boat on the first night.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 2
programme.desc: The deck team struggles to find their footing, and big mistakes are made. A stew begins to flirt with all male crewmembers on board. The chef struggles to get a handle on eccentric guest requests. Tension between two deckhands escalates to a heated argument.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10 - EP 3
programme.desc: A group of wealthy socialites keep the crew busy. The stews vie for attention from the guys. Meanwhile, the deck team downfall continues as major mistakes cause chaos including a deckhand that floats out to sea on a jet ski.

programme.desc: Dr. Animo has made a scary transformation and found a way to release the very dangerous animal nature of humans, including Max's life-long friend!

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 32
programme.desc: Ben discovers Steam Smythe excavating a 'House of the Future' built by Max's childhood idol, in search of a powerful device that will allow him to create devastating weapons for his war on progress.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 33
programme.desc: While Ben, Gwen and Max hike to a waterfall, the Bugg Brothers are back with a plan to duplicate Diamondhead, but their cloning ray gun fires on Max instead, multiplying him endlessly.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 34
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max revisit their favourite amusement park, renovated and rebranded as AdrenaWORLD. Unfortunately, the new management is Zombozo and his trio of new henchmen!

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 35
programme.desc: Ben and his arch-enemy, Billy Billions, clash in a duel for supremacy at the world's largest Laser Tag Park, Laser Town when Billy inadvertently ignites a robot rebellion.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1 - EP 36
programme.desc: Ben's holiday to Portland is cut short when he discovers an 11th alien while battling a Dr. Animo Mega-Creature and damages his Omnitrix in a fight.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: While on a visit to Cape Canaveral, the Tennyson Trio attends the inaugural launch of an experimental space plane. When Vilgax commandeers the ship, Ben must stop him from weaponising the shuttle.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: After stumbling upon a cute cat-dog-rabbit creature hybrid, or 'Cadobbit', Ben ignores Grandpa Max's advice and sneaks the animal onto the Rustbucket, but is soon in over his head as it turns on him.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Ben and Billy Billions go head-to-head over a Sumo Slammer Set sold exclusively inside the world's largest shopping centre, only to find six-year-old Simon Sez has gotten to it first.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Aboard the SS Pettigrew on its final voyage, Ben must battle seasickness as well as Steam Smythe, who looks to use his mechanical creatures to sink the steamship's modern replacement.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: With new Omni-Enhancements in tow, Ben plans on saving a town from a sudden mudslide, but his heroics are short-lived once Vilgax appears to warn him about the Omnitrix's mysterious new alien.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: After discovering that Vilgax has joined forces with the Weatherheads, Ben must not only overcome his doubts, but must also fully embrace his new powers if he is to beat his foes.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: When their attempt to get a photo with every storefront mascot is foiled, Ben and Gwen sneak out to get a snap with a wooden bear totem known as 'Yawk' only to find all the mascots have come to life.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: When a cavity forces Ben to consult a dentist, his day gets worse when the mean magician Hex uses a dreamcatcher to bring Ben's fears to life and transports them both to a nightmarish dreamscape.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: When the Rustbucket must have a tune-up in the same town as Zombozo's latest campaign trail stop, Ben discovers the clown is using his speeches to hypnotise and rob the town.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: As the Tennysons dig up dinosaur fossils in the Badlands, Ben is unaware that Vilgax and Dr. Amino have teamed up to steal alien DNA from the Omnitrix. Vilgax then double-crosses his fellow villain.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2 - EP 11
programme.desc: During a live feed of the new transcontinental bullet train, La Grange enters the picture to outrace the train, but Ben joins in on the fun and will stop at nothing to come out on top!

programme.title: Top Chef S17 - EP 8
programme.desc: It's Restaurant Wars and this season Padma takes all the limitations off the table as the chefs can make as much food as they want and shop wherever they choose. The two winning chefs from last week's concept challenge are given 48 hours to pick their teams and make the restaurants they pitched come to life.

programme.title: Top Chef S17 - EP 9
programme.desc: The chefs head to the mountains, a few hours outside of Los Angeles to go to Summer Camp where they are challenged to an outdoor grilling Quickfire for Padma and "Top Chef" Kentucky winner Kelsey Barnard Clark. Before the sun rises, the chefs get to work on an upscale brunch buffet for 200 moms vacationing at the camp using a very limited stock pantry.

programme.title: Top Chef S17 - EP 10
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world's largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. "The Dean" David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 76
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2

programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Nuclear power is attempting a comeback, but producing the necessary fuel is complex. From mining to enrichment, can new technologies and supply chains scale to power the next generation of reactors?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they’re far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S5 - EP 1
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets California’s First Couple, Governor Gavin Newsom and Jennifer Siebel Newsom, visiting their home in Marin County and offices in Sacramento to see how they work together.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns
programme.desc: Small towns are at the center of President Donald Trump's mass deportation campaign, spearheaded by ICE. In one rural New Mexico county, officials are grappling with what it means to be an ICE town.

programme.title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly S3 - EP 12
programme.desc: The hosts talk with Emmanuel Acho about his reinvention from NFL linebacker to media leader, his show "Uncomfortable Conversations" and his new effort, "Speakeasy."

Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Americas Now
programme.desc: Americas Now profiles the development, diversity and challenges facing the Americas, particularly Latin America. The strength of the program is its storytelling. Correspondents across the region present insightful, well-researched and engaging narratives. Americas Now is a compelling, authoritative and balanced voice from the region, giving CGTN a competitive edge in the North American media market.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. The Heat presents tough issues from a comprehensive, balanced and international and Chinese perspective. Guests from on the spot and around the world ensure lively debate and a range of voices. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world._x000D__x000D__x000D_

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling. The program provides a unique platform for the best current affairs documentaries from around the globe. Big Story aims to present the contemporary world and China’s global perspectives on the contemporary world to an international audience.

Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. programme.title: TAKE MY WORD FOR IT - EP 27
programme.desc: This drama centres around the experiences of members of the Police Negotiation Cadre (PNC), a volunteer unit of the Hong Kong police force specialising in negotiations with terrorist members, partakers of local violence, as well as individuals contemplating suicide.

programme.title: Case X Decoded - EP 9
programme.desc: A rift develops between sheriff To Hoi Bun and policewoman Yim Cheuk Wing due to an unresolved case. Later, while re-investigating it, they clear up their misunderstandings, and through repeated collaboration build a strong bond as partners fighting side by side.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 32
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2212
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Shining Just for You - EP 25
programme.desc: The drama centers Ye Ling Shuang (Peng Xiao Ran) is a young woman who can foresee great tragedies and disasters before they happen. What will she do in the face of her ‘curse’ as well as the Emperor’s demands?

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 884
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 34
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 3
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 4
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2212
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 16
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] AKL top management put pressure on Tak-kiu due to some scandalous story about him and Yi-ka, resulting in him being unable to vote for Yat-yin on the board. Hang-fong suggests a deal to Yat-yin. If Yat-yin allows the hospital to sell patient information, she could get Hang-fong’s vote in exchange.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 17
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong Yan releases some recording to prove Yat-yin has joined Zodiac only because of vengeance. Yat-yin is suspended, and Fong Yan readily becomes the Chair. Because of the recording, Lai-suet suspects Yat-yin was the culprit behind the plane crash. But Yi-ka has reservations.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 18
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Hau-tong’s grandson is about to undergo heart surgery, and Yat-yin’s fate depends on the success or failure of this operation. However, Yat-yin’s carpel tunnel syndrome worsens, and her right hand is too weak to even hold cutlery. Fong Yan tries to abort Yat-yin’s surgery.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 19
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] After receiving some message from Yi-ka, Yat-yin promptly returns to Hong Kong to deal with the poaching scheme initiated by Fong Yan. Yat-yin’s attempt to retain employees with higher salaries proves to be futile as about 100 medical staff members are resigning, and Kin-pong is one of them.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 20
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] To deal with mass resignations at Zodiac, Wing-sing earnestly offers support. The Malaysian Medical Center collapses as some investor is arrested for money laundering. During the investigation, Yi-ka finds out Tak-kiu already knows that particular investor is dodgy and keeps her in the dark.

programme.title: Honour - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 2
programme.desc: Pan-ho tries to make Ho-young recall any clue that could point to him as the hit-and-run culprit. Sang-hyuk is determined to find the killer, but Gang-heon orders him to return to the States

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 10
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.
